gaps.snippet: # [doc = " What to ingest."] # [derive (Debug , Clone)] pub struct BuildInput { # [doc = " The repo root (all source paths are recorded repo-relative to it — stable provenance)."] pub repo_root : PathBuf , # [doc = " The markdown corpus root (e.g. `docs`), if any."] pub corpus_root : Option < PathBuf > , # [doc = " The JSON-schema root (e.g. `docs/spec/schemas`), if any."] pub schemas_root : Option < PathBuf > , # [doc = " The research-evidence-base root (`research/`) — the T0.x/T1.x/T2.x prior-art surveys and"] # [doc = " findings every normative claim traces back to. Ingested the same way as `corpus_root` (a flat"] # [doc = " markdown walk; skip-graceful if absent), so its `*-RECORD.md` files join the shared anchor"] # [doc = " universe and the `tools/docgen/notebooklm/research.json` cluster manifest (which globs"] # [doc = " `research/*-RECORD.md`) resolves to real ingested pages instead of an always-empty subset"] # [doc = " (G2: was a silent source-ingestion gap, not a manifest bug — `BuildInput::conventional` below"] # [doc = " closes it for every command, not just `--manifest`)."] pub research_root : Option < PathBuf > , # [doc = " Example/project roots to project `.myc` nodules from (e.g. `examples`)."] pub example_roots : Vec < PathBuf > , # [doc = " Individual markdown files **outside** `corpus_root`/`research_root` to ingest through the"] # [doc = " same pipeline (so their cross-references resolve against the full anchor universe, same as"] # [doc = " everything under `docs/`). v0 use: `CONTRIBUTING.md` — needed both by the book output"] # [doc = " (§`crate::book`, for its Contributing chapter) and by `myc-doc build --manifest"] # [doc = " docs/book-manifest.json` (the same chapter, scoped-emission path) — both wire it in here so"] # [doc = " it rides the *same* ingest+resolve pipeline rather than each inventing its own bolt-on. A"] # [doc = " listed path that does not exist is skipped, not an error (the same skip-graceful posture as"] # [doc = " `example_roots`)."] pub extra_md_files : Vec < PathBuf > , }

gaps.snippet: # [doc = " Build the resolved doc model from the input."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Errors"] # [doc = " Propagates the first filesystem error (with its path) — never a silent skip of a present source."] pub fn build (input : & BuildInput) -> std :: io :: Result < DocModel > { let mut alloc = AnchorAlloc :: new () ; let mut docs : Vec < Node > = Vec :: new () ; let mut file_index : BTreeMap < String , String > = BTreeMap :: new () ; if let Some (root) = & input . corpus_root { let mut md = collect_files (root , "md") ? ; md . sort () ; for path in md { if is_excluded (& path) { continue ; } let rel = repo_rel (& input . repo_root , & path) ; let src = std :: fs :: read_to_string (& path) ? ; let kind = classify (& rel) ; let node = ingest (& rel , & src , kind , & mut alloc) ; file_index . insert (rel . clone () , node . anchor . clone ()) ; docs . push (node) ; } } if let Some (root) = & input . research_root { let mut md = collect_files (root , "md") ? ; md . sort () ; for path in md { if is_excluded (& path) { continue ; } let rel = repo_rel (& input . repo_root , & path) ; let src = std :: fs :: read_to_string (& path) ? ; let kind = classify (& rel) ; let node = ingest (& rel , & src , kind , & mut alloc) ; file_index . insert (rel . clone () , node . anchor . clone ()) ; docs . push (node) ; } } for path in & input . extra_md_files { if ! path . exists () { continue ; } let rel = repo_rel (& input . repo_root , path) ; let src = std :: fs :: read_to_string (path) ? ; let kind = classify (& rel) ; let node = ingest (& rel , & src , kind , & mut alloc) ; file_index . insert (rel . clone () , node . anchor . clone ()) ; docs . push (node) ; } if let Some (root) = & input . schemas_root { let mut schemas = collect_files (root , "json") ? ; schemas . sort () ; for path in schemas { if is_excluded (& path) || ! ends_with (& path , ".schema.json") { continue ; } let rel = repo_rel (& input . repo_root , & path) ; let src = std :: fs :: read_to_string (& path) ? ; if let Some (node) = apiref :: project_schema (& rel , & src , & mut alloc) { file_index . insert (rel . clone () , node . anchor . clone ()) ; docs . push (node) ; } } } for root in & input . example_roots { if ! root . exists () { continue ; } let mut myc = collect_files (root , "myc") ? ; myc . sort () ; for path in myc { if is_excluded (& path) { continue ; } let rel = repo_rel (& input . repo_root , & path) ; let src = std :: fs :: read_to_string (& path) ? ; let node = apiref :: project_nodule (& rel , & src , & mut alloc) ; file_index . insert (rel . clone () , node . anchor . clone ()) ; docs . push (node) ; } } let prelim = DocModel :: new (docs) ; let anchors : std :: collections :: BTreeSet < String > = prelim . anchors . keys () . cloned () . collect () ; let corpus_rel = input . corpus_root . as_ref () . map (| r | repo_rel (& input . repo_root , r)) ; let ctx = ResolveCtx { anchors , file_index , corpus_rel , } ; let resolved : Vec < Node > = prelim . documents . iter () . map (| d | resolve_node (d , & ctx)) . collect () ; Ok (DocModel :: new (resolved)) }
